nasb.text: “You shall not move your neighbor’s boundary mark, which the ancestors have set, in your inheritance which you will inherit in the land that the Lord your God gives you to possess.

esv.text: “You shall not move your neighbor’s landmark, which the men of old have set, in the inheritance that you will hold in the land that the Lord your God is giving you to possess.

cnv.text: “在耶和華你的　神要賜給你承受為業的地上，不可挪移你鄰舍的地界，因為那是先人立定的。

ccb.text: “在你们的上帝耶和华将要赐给你们作产业之地，你们不可挪动邻居的界石，因为那是先人立的。
